mapper.select:
SELECT pcl.prmsn_chg_log_oid AS prmsnChgLogOid, pcl.chnrg_user_id AS chnrgUserId, pcl.trgt_user_id AS trgtUserId, pcl.user_menu_authrt_oid AS userMenuAuthrtOid, pcl.menu_oid AS menuOid, m.menu_nm AS menuNm, pcl.prmsn_type AS prmsnType, pcl.old_vl AS oldVl, pcl.new_vl AS newVl, pcl.chg_type AS chgType, pcl.chg_dt AS chgDt, pcl.rsn, pcl.reg_dt AS regDt, pcl.reg_id AS regId FROM ${schema}.prmsn_chg_log pcl LEFT JOIN ${schema}.menu m ON pcl.menu_oid = m.menu_oid
AND pcl.chnrg_user_id LIKE CONCAT('%', #{searchValue}, '%')
AND pcl.trgt_user_id LIKE CONCAT('%', #{searchValue}, '%')
AND pcl.prmsn_type LIKE CONCAT('%', #{searchValue}, '%')
AND pcl.chg_type = #{chgType}
AND pcl.chg_dt >= STR_TO_DATE(#{startDate}, '%Y-%m-%d %H:%i:%s')
AND pcl.chg_dt <= STR_TO_DATE(#{endDate}, '%Y-%m-%d %H:%i:%s')
AND pcl.reg_dt >= STR_TO_DATE(CONCAT(REPLACE(#{excelExportYm}, '-', ''), '01'), '%Y%m%d')
AND pcl.reg_dt < DATE_ADD(STR_TO_DATE(CONCAT(REPLACE(#{excelExportYm}, '-', ''), '01'), '%Y%m%d'), INTERVAL 1 MONTH)
